name: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
overview: Get to know Atlanta hip-hop stars like Rasheesa Frost, Karlie Redd, Yung Joc, Renni Rucci, Erica Mena and more as they make music, build businesses and juggle their relationships.

trailers.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta | Season 6 Official Super Trailer | Premieres March 6 + 8/7C
